data.title: Dawkins hired at FT’s P&C Specialist
data.description: Jennifer Ortakales Dawkins has been hired as a reporter at FT’s P&C Specialist. She has been freelancing for most of the past two years. Dawkins previously covering retail for Business Insider as a senior reporter. She also covered entrepreneurship for Business Insider. She interned at Papercut Magazine and at EdTech Times. data.description: VANCOUVER, British Columbia, Nov. 14, 2025 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) — The Indigenous Partnerships Success Showcase (IPSS) celebrated outstanding leadership, partnership, and community impact on Thursday, November 13, as part of its sixth annual gathering in Vancouver.
